name: Smokes and Wires
descs:
Against enemies, allies inflict x2 [Laceration] Potency with Skill effects.

Turn End: enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' lose 2 Speed next turn.

Against enemies, allies inflict x2 [Laceration] Potency with Skill effects.

Turn End: enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' lose <style="upgradeHighlight">3</style> Speed next turn.

Against enemies, allies inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">x2.5 [Laceration] Potency</style> with Skill effects.

Turn End: enemies with [Laceration] or 'Unique Bleed' lose 3 Speed next turn.
